_comment: Example HARNESS_MCP_CONFIG file. Set HARNESS_MCP_CONFIG=/data/mcp-servers.json (or wherever you put this) and restart the harness. See TOT-specs.md §8.3 for full semantics. ${VAR} placeholders expand from os.environ at load time so tokens stay out of the file.

allowed_tools._comment: Explicit allow-list per server. We do NOT auto-discover tools — that would let a misbehaving MCP server expose writes you never reviewed. Each entry becomes an mcp__<server>__<tool> name added to every agent's allowed_tools.
